name: Vegetarian Burgers (the Uncow Burger)
recipeInstructions:
1. With a fork or potato masher, mash the butter beans slightly. They should be chunky, not pureed.
2. Add the cooked bulgur, barley, quick oatmeal, soy sauce, barbecue sauce, dried basil, onions, garlic, celery, salt, and pepper to the mashed beans. Mix until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Form the mixture into 6 patties.
4. Spray a skillet with oil and cook the patties on both sides until browned.
